subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down whatsoever He willeth from the heaven of bounty. He, verily, is the All-Powerful over whatsoever He willeth through His command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل ما اراد من سماء العطاء انه هو المقتدر علی ما اراد بامره
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for women, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
